creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 182312
svn diff to upgrade to v0.20.7

Many thanks for your patch, however as swills mentioned in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=218573 I don't think the dependancy versions have ever been correct.  While this patch continues with the method I had used previously, I think we should do it 'properly'.  Also, gohugo requires Go 1.8 as of v0.20 rather than Go 1.5.

I have amended your patch with the Go version bump, and better matched the Github repo revisions with the vendors.json file.
